ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trainees" (
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trainee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the trainee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Hiring date of the trainee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainee for contact purposes */,
  "training_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the trainee's previous training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the trainer belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Hiring date of the trainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer for contact purposes */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the training program (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in days */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of trainees the program can accommodate */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program this session belongs to */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer leading this session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session (if in-person) */,
  "zoom_link" TEXT /* Zoom link for online sessions */,
  "number_of_trainees" INTEGER /* Number of trainees registered for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainee who registered */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program this registration is for */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session this registration is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee registered for the program */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee canceled the registration, if applicable */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_trainee_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainee_id") REFERENCES trainees ("trainee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of training content */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program this content belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the training content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training content */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the training content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., video, document, quiz) */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the content in minutes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the content was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_content_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration this progress entry belongs to */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training content this progress entry is for */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee completed the training content */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the trainee received for the training content */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the trainee started the content */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts the trainee made to complete the content */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the trainee has completed the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES training_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration this feedback belongs to */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training content this feedback is for */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the trainee or trainer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the content */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback was given anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES training_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, trainee) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
